mapper.select: SELECT * FROM categories WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM categories WHERE name = #{name} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM categories WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM categories WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM categories WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO categories (name, description, deleted) VALUES (#{name}, #{description}, 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE categories SET deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
